beats.activity: Wake up, shower, make espresso at home.
beats.reasoning: Sunday morning ritual. Low energy yesterday (35/100) means a slower start; espresso and quiet time to ease into the day.

beats.activity: Drive to Green Lake for an early run.
beats.reasoning: Perfect 72F sunny conditions are ideal for trail running; Marcus naturally gravitates toward outdoor movement to shake off low weekend energy.
Calm sunny conditions perfect for a focused run; this mirrors his pattern from recent days where running settles his mood and restores energy.
Post-run routine; needs to clean up before midday activities.

beats.activity: Relax at home, read fly-fishing magazines, light breakfast.
beats.reasoning: Hyper-focused personality: after exertion, Marcus zones into his fly-fishing daydreams; planning the Snoqualmie trip next weekend settles him.

beats.activity: Drive to Lake Union to scout paddle/boat activity and grab lunch.
beats.reasoning: World event: Lake Union has heavy recreational boat and paddle traffic this afternoon; Marcus's curiosity and observer nature would pull him to check it out before peak hours.

beats.activity: Lunch and people-watching at a waterfront café near Lake Union.
beats.reasoning: Values quiet observation over crowds; a casual meal lets him watch the water traffic without the chaos of peak boat hours. Refuses drip coffee, so he'd grab a proper espresso drink here.

beats.activity: Walk around Lake Union waterfront, watching kayakers and sailboats.
beats.reasoning: Calm sunny day and recreational traffic draw him to observe; his hyper-focus can lock onto details like boat handling and water conditions.
Afternoon wind-down; Marcus prefers to be home by early evening on a Sunday.

beats.activity: Afternoon at home: prep fly-fishing gear for next weekend, check weather forecasts, prep an early dinner.
beats.reasoning: Hyper-focus on planning the Snoqualmie trip; checking river conditions and gear keeps him engaged. Quiet Sunday aligns with his preference for close friends over crowds.

beats.activity: Cook and eat dinner, clean up.
beats.reasoning: Sunday evening meal; grilled salmon mirrors recent patterns and fits his rhythm.

beats.activity: Evening at home: read, plan Snoqualmie trip itinerary, prepare gear bag.
beats.reasoning: Hyper-focus on the coming fishing trip; calm Sunday evening settling into restful mode.
7.5 hours of sleep; ends before 6:30am Monday, allowing a fresh start for a potential early shift at Sea-Tac.

world_event_prompt: Calm, sunny Sunday, high of 72F. Quiet end-of-week day with no major disruptions. Lake Union sees heavy recreational boat and paddle traffic in the afternoon.
